_comment: Curated overrides for HSK entries where the source dataset assigned a rare/literary reading or a wrong/garbled gloss (the bestForm heuristic can't always disambiguate polyphonic characters). Keyed by simplified hanzi. Only `pinyinNumbered` and/or `glossEn` may be set; tonePattern is recomputed from the corrected pinyin. Applied at build time (scripts/build-seed) and to the shipped snapshot (scripts/apply-seed-corrections.mjs).
